name: pixel-mage
description: A mobile-first one-thumb action game about rewriting one living spell.

scripts.check: npm run workflow:check && npm run localization:check && npm run controls:check && npm run polish:check && npm run fx:check && npm run enemy:check && npm run cell:check && npm run launcher:check && node --check game.js && node scripts/check.mjs && npm run build && node scripts/check-build.mjs && npm run size:report && npm run assets:android && node scripts/check-android.mjs
scripts.preview: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 4173 --directory dist
scripts.android:sync: npm run check && cap sync android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
